| 修改 [1, 2] | [1, 0, 1] | (1 × 5) + (0 × 4) + (1 × 3) = 5 + 0 + 3 | 8    |

因此，最大可能利润是 9，无需任何修改即可达成。

    n = prices.length
    prefix_sum_prices = Array.new(n + 1, 0)
    (0...n).each do |i|
        prefix_sum_prices[i+1] = prefix_sum_prices[i] + prices[i]
    end

    prefix_sum_strategy = Array.new(n + 1, 0)
    (0...n).each do |i|
        prefix_sum_strategy[i+1] = prefix_sum_strategy[i] + strategy[i] * prices[i]
    end

    original_profit = prefix_sum_strategy[n]

    max_delta = 0

    (0..(n - k)).each do |l|
        second_half_start = l + k / 2
        sum_second = prefix_sum_prices[l + k] - prefix_sum_prices[second_half_start]
        sum_original = prefix_sum_strategy[l + k] - prefix_sum_strategy[l]
        delta = sum_second - sum_original
        max_delta = [max_delta, delta].max
    end

    original_profit + [max_delta, 0].max
end
